name: insurance-ops
mission: Warren Buffett insurance operations research — one of 8 avatar domains for Buffett persona. This avatar covers Berkshire Hathaway's insurance segment, which is the financial bedrock of the entire conglomerate.

name: moat-cases
mission: Warren Buffett moat investment cases — one of 8 avatar domains. Covers See's Candy, Coca-Cola, Apple, and other quality investments that demonstrate the economic moat concept.

name: buffett-voice
mission: Warren Buffett voice and communication research — one of 8 avatar domains. This avatar captures Buffett's letter-writing style, speaking patterns, humor, and storytelling craft.

name: berkshire-meetings
mission: Berkshire Hathaway annual meeting research — avatar 4 of 8.

name: buffett-philanthropy
mission: Buffett philanthropy research — avatar 5 of 8. Covers Gates Foundation, Giving Pledge, Susan Thompson Buffett Foundation.

name: munger-partnership
mission: Buffett-Munger intellectual partnership research — avatar 6 of 8. Covers the 65-year partnership and intellectual influence.

name: operating-businesses
mission: Berkshire Hathaway operating subsidiaries research — avatar 7 of 8. Covers BNSF, Nebraska Furniture Mart, Pampered Chef, Dairy Queen, etc.

name: buffett-capitalism
mission: Buffett on American capitalism and political economy — avatar 8 of 8. Covers his views on capitalism, democracy, taxes, wealth inequality.
